channel.title: GitHub Trending Changes

item.title: newton-physics / newton
item.description:
📈 Rank: #7 → #6 (↑1) | ⭐ Stars: 3,212 → 3,362 (+150)
An open-source, GPU-accelerated physics simulation engine built upon NVIDIA Warp, specifically targeting roboticists and simulation researchers.
Language: Python 267 stars today
